verification.gridBehavior: With md:col-start-2 class, the discourse div starts at column 2 of the md:grid-cols-2 grid. When ThemeHeading is hidden (hasContent=false), the discourse div appears in the right column position, matching the layout when ThemeHeading is present.

noHeadingVariation.purpose: The md:col-start-2 fix ensures consistent column positioning: when ThemeHeading is present, it occupies column 1 and discourse occupies column 2; when ThemeHeading is hidden, discourse still occupies column 2 (right side) instead of shifting to column 1 (left side).
